cta: Come back when you've fixed it. Application stays open.
caption_full:
20 applications. 6 vetted. ↓

Here's the detailed feedback we gave the 14 who didn't make it — because rejection without explanation is useless.

Come back when you've fixed it. Application stays open.

#SyncMaster #AfricanComposers #MusicBusiness #SyncReady #MusicRights

slides.body: Here's the detailed feedback we gave the 14 who didn't make it — because rejection without explanation is useless. ↓ Most of these overlap. Most are fixable.

All 20 composers were genuinely talented. /14 had metadata problems
→ No ISRC codes assigned
→ No BPM, key, or mood data
→ Files with no embedded information

The 14 we didn't accept were rejected for readiness, not music. /14 had response issues
→ 3+ day reply time in the response-time test scenario

THE BREAKDOWN: /14 had file issues
→ Only MP3 available
→ No stems exported or accessible
→ Files not named to any standard

/14 had rights issues
→ Labels holding masters with no clear route to clearance
→ Uncleared samples embedded in commercial-quality work
→ Publishing registered with

slides.headline: Open briefs. Every Tuesday.
slides.body: Composers: apply once, get matched for life. Supervisors: shortlist in 48h.
